🎯 Interests & Goals

Deeply passionate about two worlds — the digital and the physical. I love mobile gaming, cricket, and using technology to solve real problems in society.

  • Aspiring to become a professional Cricketer or Pro Gamer
  • Build impactful tech products for social good
  • Explore AI, App Development & Sustainable Tech
  • Represent Maharashtra in sports & technology events

🏆 Flagship Academic Projects
🤖
Ai4A Project

AI for All — Smart Solutions

Participated in the Ai4A initiative, exploring how AI can be democratised and applied to solve everyday challenges for students and communities.

  • Real-world AI use cases
  • Hands-on with AI tools & frameworks
  • Inclusive technology access focus
🌳
Design Thinking Project

Miyawaki Forest — Sustainable & Visitor-Safe

Applied Design Thinking to propose a sustainable Miyawaki Forest model that is safe for visitors with informative plant boards, safe pathways and eco-education guides.

  • Visitor safety protocol design
  • Plant information signage system
  • Urban green space biodiversity
♻️
ACE Project

E-Waste Management Policy

Researched and proposed comprehensive E-Waste Management Policies for MIT VPU, Solapur city, and Maharashtra — addressing collection, disposal and digital sustainability.

  • University-level policy framework
  • Solapur city disposal guidelines
  • Maharashtra state recommendations
